# ArchSpine – FUNDING.yml

## Role
Placeholder for project funding configuration.

## Responsibilities
- Indicates the intended funding mechanism (GitHub Sponsors).
- Provides instructions for enabling sponsorship when ready.

## Out of Scope
- Actual sponsorship setup or financial details.
- Any other funding sources or platforms.

## Public Surface

## Key Takeaways

- When ready, uncomment the sponsor line with the GitHub organization or username.
- This is a minimal configuration stub, not a full funding policy.
